news.title: Market expert sees S&P hitting 7,900 this year
news.summary:
STORY: "We just completed the best quarter in six years," says Bernstein. He expects earnings growth of roughly 23% to 28% this year, driven not only by large-cap companies but also by small- and mid-cap stocks, which he believes will continue to push the market higher.

While he does not expect the Federal Reserve to cut interest rates this year, Bernstein believes easing inflation, helped by falling oil prices, could give policymakers room to make cuts in the spring of 2027.
